segments.text: Every beauty brand today uses the exact
same boring plastic bottles. But this
brand did the complete opposite. They
built a massive business by taking their
brand 200 years in the past. Meet Buy
1803. While everybody else uses cheap
plastic, they use heavy glass, metal
tubes, and ceramic jars. It looks
exactly like a wizard's potion shop. But
looking cool is not enough to survive
against giant modern skincare brands. So
instead of using lab chemicals, they
revived 19th century forgotten Parisian
beauty recipes. Still in a world of
online deliveries, how do they get
people to line up at their physical
stores? The secret is the final touch.
When you buy in store, a real
calligrapher handwrites your name on the
vintage label right in front of you.
They turn packaging into personalized
art. Homogeneous packaging. Subscribe.
